headline: Old Dominion Unveils Weak LTL Unit Performance for February
summary: ODFL's revenues per day fall 3.3% year over year in February 2026, owing to 6.8% decrease in LTL tons per day, partially offset by an increase in LTL revenue per hundredweight.

raw.headline: Old Dominion Unveils Weak LTL Unit Performance for February

headline: Which S&P500 stocks are gapping on Wednesday?
summary: Curious about the market action on Wednesday? Dive into the US markets to explore the gap up and gap down stocks in the S&P500 index during today's session.

headline: Old Dominion ‘encouraged’ as declines moderate in February
summary: An update from Old Dominion Freight Line showed volume and revenue declines slowed in February. The post Old Dominion ‘encouraged’ as declines moderate in February appeared first on FreightWaves.
